paths.name: Visitor->Login->Owner board->Edit task->Activity log
paths.semanticGoal: Cover visitor entry, login success, owner/admin board load, task detail edit flow, and navigation to activity log with successful load.

paths.name: Register->Create project->Setup structure->Create task override
paths.semanticGoal: Cover registration success, empty project list, project creation, initial empty board, board structure update, and task creation with WIP override as owner/admin.

paths.name: Login->Empty projects->Accept invite->Member board->Members->Activity
paths.semanticGoal: Cover invitation acceptance flow from empty project list, then load member board and navigate to members page and activity log empty state.

paths.name: Viewer board->Open task detail viewer->Archived view empty
paths.semanticGoal: Cover viewer board load, read-only task detail open/close, then archived view navigation and empty-state load.

paths.name: Owner/admin members -> Invite stored -> Members load fails -> Retry -> Back to board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked membership invitation success persistence plus unwalked members page load failure+retry cycle returning to board.

paths.name: Owner settings load fails -> Retry -> Update settings success -> Refresh -> Back to board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked project settings page failure+retry plus unwalked successful settings update flow and refresh cycle.

paths.name: Owner archives project->Archived view ready
paths.semanticGoal: Cover owner project archive success flow from settings and verify archived view loads successfully after archiving.

paths.name: Login reject->Retry login->Projects error->Retry->Logout
paths.semanticGoal: Cover failed login path, retry to success, project list load error with retry, and logout back to landing.

paths.name: Member drags task->Move conflict->Return to board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover member task move flow with conflict outcome and ensure returning to board reloads to ready state.

paths.name: Owner/admin board -> Configure WIP -> Rejected -> Back to board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked entry into WIP rule feature and rejected submission path returning to board.

paths.name: Owner archives task->Rejected->Refresh task panel
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked task archive rejection and unwalked refresh back into task detail panel, then return to board.

paths.name: Owner/admin board -> Task detail -> Change assignees success -> Refresh panel -> Close to board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked task-assignment feature path (submit+success) and refresh back into task detail panel.

paths.name: Owner/admin board -> Task detail -> Add comment rejected -> Refresh -> Close to board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked task-comment submission and rejection path with refresh back to task panel.

paths.name: Owner/admin board -> Task detail -> Status change rejected -> Refresh -> Close to board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked task-status submission and illegal transition rejection path with refresh back to task panel.

paths.name: Login->Open invitations->Reject invite->Back->Logout
paths.semanticGoal: Cover invitation rejection flow from ready project list and ensure user can return to projects and logout to landing.

paths.name: Member board->Create task->WIP blocked->Return to board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked member create-task entry, unwalked submitTask, unwalked WIP rejection, and unwalked return-to-member-board connector.

paths.name: Owner/admin board -> Drag task -> Override move -> Back to board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked owner/admin drag-to-move entry and unwalked override-move success path returning to board.

paths.name: Visitor landing -> Register CTA -> Register rejected -> Back to register -> Back to landing
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked Landing->Register CTA, registration rejection and returning to landing from register.

paths.name: Member board -> Open task -> Task detail fails -> Retry -> Close back to member board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked member open-task connector, task detail load failure+retry, and unwalked close-back-to-member-board connector.

paths.name: Viewer board->Members load fails->Retry->Back to board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked viewer-to-members navigation, unwalked members load failure+retry cycle, and unwalked return to viewer board.

paths.name: Login->Projects ready->Create project rejected->Back to projects
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked create-project entry from ready list, rejected creation, and unwalked return to project list with reload.

paths.name: Member board -> Realtime disconnect -> Resync -> Archived view
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked member-board realtime disconnect+resync handling and unwalked navigation to archived view.

paths.name: Owner/admin board -> Manage boards/lists -> Structure update rejected -> Back to board
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked board-structure management entry and rejected mutation flow returning to board.

paths.name: Archived view fails->Retry success (from board)
paths.semanticGoal: Cover navigation from owner/admin board to archived view, failure state, and retry to successful ready state.

paths.name: Owner/admin members->Role change success->Archived view
paths.semanticGoal: Cover role change success in membership management, then navigate to archived view and load archived items successfully.

paths.name: Owner/admin members->Remove member success->Activity log
paths.semanticGoal: Cover successful member removal flow and verify navigation to activity log with successful load.

paths.name: Member board empty->Back to projects
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked member-board empty-state transition and unwalked navigation back to project list.

paths.name: Member board load fails->Retry to ready
paths.semanticGoal: Cover member board snapshot load failure and retry path to reach ready state.

paths.name: Owner board load fails->Retry to ready
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked owner/admin board snapshot failure and unwalked retry path returning to ready state.

paths.name: Viewer board load fails->Retry to ready
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked viewer-board load failure, unwalked retry, and recovery to ready state.

paths.name: Owner/admin board realtime disconnect->Resync
paths.semanticGoal: Cover realtime disconnect handling on owner/admin board and ensure reconnect triggers a fresh resync back to ready state.

paths.name: Viewer realtime disconnect->Resync to ready
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked viewer realtimeDisconnected and reconnectAndResync handling, returning to ready state.
